entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Improved varieties of groundnut used in the study to increase productivity

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the Tropical Legume Project and USAID groundnut up-scaling Project were implemented

entities.name: TROPICAL LEGUME PROJECT
entities.description: A project (TL III) focused on the breeding and promotion of improved groundnut varieties in Nigeria

entities.name: USAID GROUNDNUT UP-SCALING PROJECT
entities.description: A project that worked in synergy with the Tropical Legume Project to scale up groundnut varieties

entities.name: PURPOSIVE SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling technique used to select groundnut farmers for the study

entities.name: SIMPLE RANDOM SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling technique used to select groundnut farmers for the study

entities.name: ELECTRONIC DATA CAPTURING
entities.description: An instrument used to collect primary data from farmers

entities.name: QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: A tool contained within the electronic data capturing instrument for data collection

entities.name: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the collected data

entities.name: AVERAGE TREATMENT EFFECT
entities.description: A framework used to analyze the adoption of improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: ADOPTION
entities.description: The process of farmers accepting and utilizing improved agricultural technologies and varieties

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output level of agricultural production which is increased through technology adoption

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic condition that agricultural innovations aim to alleviate and reduce

entities.name: ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The broad goal of improving economic conditions through agricultural productivity

entities.name: AWARENESS
entities.description: The level of knowledge farmers have regarding improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to obtain improved variety seeds

entities.name: UTILIZATION
entities.description: The actual use of improved groundnut varieties by farmers
